title: The Guards Open Fire
description: The Straw Hats and their allies force their way deeper into Enies Lobby while guards and agents scramble to stop them.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, Sogeking, Nami. The Straw Hats and their allies force their way deeper into Enies Lobby while guards and agents scramble to stop them.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Could there be a drunken hostage....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: When heat bubbles mix with cool bubbles...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This perfect CLIMA TACT is amazing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let's try it out on you guys...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It hurts both friend and foe!!

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: It beat quite a few of them!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WH... What's the deal with them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're the one who should apologize, idiot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Clearly, she's one of their main fighters!!

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: So, if we have to search...

summary: The Straw Hats and their allies force their way deeper into Enies Lobby while guards and agents scramble to stop them.
